product.name: ArBo
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra fire resistant, world's strongest synthetic fabrics from Pbo (polyphenylene benzobisoxazole)
product.titleDescriptor: 58% para Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon fabric, 220 gr/m'2
descriptions: arbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Plain Fabric
World's strongest systhetic fabric which contains Pbo (poly phenylene benzobisoxazole)
220 g/m², 58% p-Aramid, 40% Pbo, 2% Carbon. ArBo is designed for firefighters's suit.
ArBo is ultra fire resistant fabric
Flame resistant (Flame retardant) fabric with EN 469 certification.
ArBo is the best fabric in all categories for turnout gear.
58% para Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon fabric, 220 gr/m'2
technicalParameters: Fiber | 58% p-Aramid (p-AR) 40% PBO (Pbo) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>5500N; Weft>5000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>270N ; Weft>310N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: ArBo is designed for firefighters's suit.
Flame resistant (Flame retardant) fabric with EN 469 certification.
applicationImageLabels: 'Pbo 4 layer firefighter suit', '50% para aramid 50% pbo turnout gear'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicitly described and certified (EN 469) as a fabric for firefighter turnout gear/suits, with application images and family descriptor confirming firefighting use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic property (EN 1149-5) present but no explicit statement of use in electrical utility or high-voltage energy sector context.

evidence: ArBo is designed for firefighters's suit.
Flame resistant (Flame retardant) fabric with EN 469 certification.
applicationImageLabels: 'Pbo 4 layer firefighter suit', '50% para aramid 50% pbo turnout gear'
primary.rationale: Fabric is explicitly designed and certified (EN 469) for firefighter turnout gear/suits, with application images and category descriptors confirming this as the dominant end use.

secondary.rationale: Antistatic property (EN 1149-5) is present but does not independently establish an energy-sector application per rule 8; no other explicit secondary use is stated.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Only antistatic property is cited (EN 1149-5); no explicit electrical/utility or high-voltage use stated, and rule 8 disallows inferring energy from antistatic alone.
No explicit military or police use stated; product is specifically for firefighters.
